chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 6219 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 26093/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Mr. Muzaffar Hussain Solangi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ch. Arif, Advocate for Respondent (KMC) ---------- Ch. Arif, Advocate appearing for the KMC has received a copy of the Petition. Learned counsel invites attention to the application made by the Petitioner to the KMC requesting extension of the period of the Contract entered into between him and the KMC on 01.01.2025 and submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied if such application were decided by the competent authority through a speaking order after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the KMC undertakes that such application would be attended to and decided accordingly within a period of 30 days from today. Let the needful be ensured. In the meanwhile, status-quo to be maintained. Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. Judge Judge Ayaz
